mapper.insert:
insert into emp_expr(emp_id, begin, end, company, job) values
(#{expr.empId}, #{expr.begin}, #{expr.end}, #{expr.company}, #{expr.job})
insert into emp_expr(emp_id, begin, end, company, job) values (#{empId}, #{begin}, #{end}, #{company}, #{job})
mapper.update: UPDATE emp_expr SET emp_id=#{empId}, begin=#{begin}, end=#{end}, company=#{company}, job=#{job} where id = id
mapper.delete:
delete from emp_expr where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select emp_expr.id from emp_expr where emp_id = #{empId}
